declare i40 @llvm.fshl(i40, i40, i40)

define i40 @fshl_i40_icmp_bool_shift(i40 %x, i40 %val) {
    %cmp = icmp ugt i40 %val, 0
    %shift = zext i1 %cmp to i40
    %res = call i40 @llvm.fshl(i40 %x, i40 0, i40 %shift)
    ret i40 %res
}
